sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pm.post_id) as `count` 
                FROM `" . $wpdb->prefix . "postmeta` pm
                INNER JOIN `" . $wpdb->prefix . "posts` p ON pm.post_id = p.ID
                LEFT JOIN `" . $wpdb->prefix . "postmeta` pm_pending ON pm.post_id = pm_pending.post_id AND pm_pending.meta_key = 'mf_payment_pending'
                WHERE pm.meta_key = %s 
                AND pm.meta_value = %d
                AND p.post_status != 'auto-draft'
                AND pm_pending.meta_value IS NULL",
                'metform_entries__form_id',
                $this->form_id
            ), OBJECT)

$wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
                " SELECT COUNT( `post_id` ) as `count`  FROM `" . $wpdb->prefix . "postmeta` WHERE `meta_key` LIKE %s AND `meta_value` = %d ",
                'metform_entries__form_id',
                $this->form_id
            ), OBJECT)

wp_remote_post( $settings['url'], array(
            'method' => 'POST',
            'timeout' => 30,
            'redirection' => 5,
            'httpversion' => '1.0',
            'blocking' => true,
            'headers' => array(),
            'body' => json_encode($data),
            'cookies' => array()
            )
        )

sanitizers.expression: wp_kses_post(__('If enabled, when an entry is permanently deleted, the files associated with it will also be deleted.', 'metform'))
wp_kses_post(__('Handle successful payment redirection page. Learn more about Thank you page. ', 'metform') . '' . __('Here', 'metform') . '')

$wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pm.post_id) as `count` 
                FROM `" . $wpdb->prefix . "postmeta` pm
                INNER JOIN `" . $wpdb->prefix . "posts` p ON pm.post_id = p.ID
                LEFT JOIN `" . $wpdb->prefix . "postmeta` pm_pending ON pm.post_id = pm_pending.post_id AND pm_pending.meta_key = 'mf_payment_pending'
                WHERE pm.meta_key = %s 
                AND pm.meta_value = %d
                AND p.post_status != 'auto-draft'
                AND pm_pending.meta_value IS NULL",
                'metform_entries__form_id',
                $this->form_id
            )

$wpdb->prepare(
                " SELECT COUNT( `post_id` ) as `count`  FROM `" . $wpdb->prefix . "postmeta` WHERE `meta_key` LIKE %s AND `meta_value` = %d ",
                'metform_entries__form_id',

            )
